series_metadata.series_description: Medication orders issued by a practitioner for an inpatient; may be an original written order, a direct carbonized copy, or facsimile or such order.

retention_rules.trigger_event: Electronic: If these are only records showing pharmacist responsible dispensing drug, maintain in a readily retrievable manner ; Paper: If these are only records showing pharmacist responsible dispensing drug, maintain in a readily retrievable manner
